data.title: Bitcoin stays below $90K as gold reaches record $5.3K amid FOMC, while USD weakens.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin recently failed to break above $90,000, despite a strong performance by gold reaching new highs and a significant drop in the value of the US dollar.

data.title: Toll Brothers opens Regency 55+ active-adult community in Pearl River, New York with carriage-style townhomes and amenities.
data.description: A recently unveiled upscale neighborhood offers carriage-style townhomes and a range of onsite amenities tailored for active-adults. The community showcases modern living spaces crafted with elegant designs to cater to individuals seeking a vibrant lifestyle. With a focus on comfort and convenience, the development boasts a collection of residences built to accommodate the unique needs of residents aged 55 and above. The amenities include pools, fitness centers, social spaces, and walking paths. data.title: Princeton Battlefield Society & Foundation Academies of Trenton to release findings of research on Black soldiers in Battle of Princeton. 152 words.
data.description: Princeton Battlefield Society (PBS) based in Princeton, New Jersey, revealed today a collaboration with Foundation Academies of Trenton (FA) to unveil the findings of FA's noteworthy study on Black soldiers who participated in the Battle for Princeton. This initiative is part of PBS' "Men Without Shoes" Project, commenced in 2025 to commemorate the overlooked common soldiers of the battle. The research sheds light on the historical contributions of these soldiers, aiming to honor their legacy. The project is tied to the upcoming 250th anniversary of New Jersey's establishment in the United States.

data.title: Global entries sought for Globee® Awards for AI recognizing workplace and business achievements worldwide. Organizing globally recognized awards to honor AI-driven achievements across individuals, teams, organizations, and innovations in products, services, and creative excellence. Located in Silicon Valley, the awards call for entries from all over the world.
data.description: Recognizing outstanding accomplishments in the field of artificial intelligence from individuals, teams, organizations, and innovative products and services worldwide, the prestigious Globee® Awards ceremony took place in Silicon Valley, California on January 28, 2026. The event celebrated excellence in AI, honoring recipients across various categories. This widely acclaimed event attracted participants and nominees from all corners of the globe, highlighting the remarkable contributions in the realm of technology.

data.title: American Hartford Gold has delivered over $4 billion in precious metals, showcasing strong growth and client trust.
data.description: American Hartford Gold (AHG), the leading physical gold and silver retailer in the nation, has achieved a significant milestone in client trust and growth. The company recently disclosed that they have successfully delivered over $4 billion worth of precious metals to their clients. This accomplishment further solidifies AHG's position in the industry and showcases their commitment to providing exceptional service to their customers.

data.title: Dark Horse CPAs promotes Jim Fisher to Principal after completing Accelerator Program, expanding Tax Advisory Practice.
data.description: Jim Fisher has successfully finished the Principal Accelerator Program and is now enhancing the tax advisory practice at Dark Horse CPAs in Cardiff by the Sea, California. This was disclosed on January 28, 2026. Dark Horse CPAs, renowned for its high-quality accounting and tax services for small businesses nationwide, has advanced Jim Fisher to a new role within the firm.

data.title: T. Rowe Price experts predict retirement trends for 2026 and beyond with focus on private assets, AI, personalized advice, & public policy.
data.description: Industry professionals are currently analyzing the future beyond 2026, focusing on key areas such as the incorporation of private assets, the impact of AI, the growing need for individualized financial guidance, and advancements in governmental regulations. T. Rowe Price, a prominent asset management company, led discussions on these topics during a recent event in Baltimore on Jan. 28, 2026. The company, known for its global reach, highlighted the importance of staying abreast with these industry trends for long-term success.

data.title: Inventor in Pittsburgh creates work boot with quick release laces for safety; inspired by co-worker's death in trench.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 28, 2026, a tragic incident occurred where a co-worker lost their life in a trench due to being stuck when a flash flood hit. An inventor who witnessed the incident shared the idea of creating a quick-release mechanism for boot laces to prevent such accidents in the future. The inventor highlighted the need for a mechanism that would enable the wearer to instantly remove their foot from a stuck boot in emergency situations. This innovation aims to address safety concerns and potentially save lives in similar work environments.
